attributes.action: Abolish the TV Licence Fee: Time for Change
attributes.additional_details: The TV licence system unfairly forces individuals to prove they don’t use live TV services, instead of requiring authorities to prove non-compliance. When people state they don’t need a licence, they’re often visited by inspectors who pressure them to allow entry, attempting to coerce them into buying a licence. These tactics are invasive and cause unnecessary stress, particularly for vulnerable groups. This outdated system needs to be replaced with one that respects personal choice and fairness.
attributes.background: We call on the UK Government and Parliament to abolish the TV licence fee and implement a more modern, voluntary, and sustainable funding model for the BBC.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Scrap the TV Licence
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/754524
